'''Haly Dura''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] mechanic who worked at [[Centax-2/Legends|Centax-2]], repairing the [[Jedi starfighter]]s during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Haly Dura worked conscientiously for the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and there were no complaints about him. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], when one of the hunters of the fleet failed during a training flight, [[Clee Rhara]], the director of the program, addressed Haly Dura and his colleague [[Tarrence Chenati]] to have access to the hunters. However, Haly and Clee Rhara couldn't find nothing and asked the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] for assistance. Eventually, [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] came to [[Centax-2/Legends|Centax-2]] and wanted to cheer up his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. They received common information from Rhara about the saboteur. Haly Dura and Tarrence Chenati were later questioned again by Clee Rhara, but [[Tahl]] and Qui-Gon were able to unmask Tarrence Chenati.
